misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Rest of the Gorosei: "Imu-sama you must not go, we will go!" Imu: "Silence, a man here killed Harald, Rocks' equal!" Garling: "Err...d-d-did you just say Rocks? Uhh, hey guys, we shouldn
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Rest of the Gorosei: "Imu-sama you must not go, we will go!" Imu: "Silence, a man here killed Harald, Rocks' equal!" Garling: "Err...d-d-did you just say Rocks? Uhh, hey guys, we shouldn't go, let's just let Imu go..." Bro got PTSD and didnt wanna pull up 😭🙏 WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1179 The Gorosei really tried everything to prevent Imu from leaving alone; ONLY Garling was the only one who stopped the others and said that "The Great One" could do whatever he wanted and should leave because no one could stop him.... — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2039256307308409300#m
